success_criteria: 0 Critical/High Vulnerabilities (Snyk/SonarQube); Linting passed; No hardcoded secrets (TruffleHog); Conventional Commits adherence
escalation_procedure: Notify developer immediately via PR comment
business_impact: Prevents technical debt and security vulnerabilities from entering the codebase.

success_criteria: Auth Service: >95% Coverage; Financial Service: >95% Coverage; AI Worker PII Logic: 100% Coverage; General: >80% Coverage
escalation_procedure: Block PR merge until coverage targets are met
business_impact: Ensures critical business logic (RBAC, Payouts, Sanitization) functions correctly before integration.

success_criteria: 100% Pass rate for Vendor Payout Saga tests; Zero ledger discrepancies in mocked transaction flows; Idempotency verification passed
escalation_procedure: Immediate alert to Backend Lead; Release blocked until transaction logic is fixed
business_impact: Prevents financial loss and ledger corruption (RISK-TECH-001).

success_criteria: Zero PII leakage in AI Worker output (Presidio checks); No raw PII stored in Vector DB logs; 100% Pass on Sanitization regression suite
tools_used: Microsoft Presidio, Custom Python Scripts, AWS Macie (Staging)
escalation_procedure: Notify Data Privacy Officer and Tech Lead
business_impact: Ensures GDPR/SOC 2 compliance and prevents data breaches (RISK-SEC-002).

success_criteria: API Response p95 < 250ms; Vector Search p95 < 300ms; SOW Processing < 60s/doc; Error rate < 0.1% under nominal load
escalation_procedure: Create performance regression ticket assigned to relevant service owner
business_impact: Guarantees system responsiveness and vendor matching capability (RISK-PERF-003).

success_criteria: 100% Pass on Critical Paths: 'Vendor Proposal Submission', 'Admin Project Award', 'Finance Payout Approval'
escalation_procedure: Halt release; rollback Staging if necessary
business_impact: Validates the system functions as a cohesive whole for end-users.

success_criteria: 100% compliance with CIS Benchmarks for EKS/RDS; No public S3 buckets; Encryption verified; Terraform state consistent
escalation_procedure: Immediate remediation required for security groups/IAM policies
business_impact: Maintains cloud security posture and prevents configuration drift.

success_criteria: All prior gates passed; Change Log generated; Rollback plan validated; Stakeholder approval received
escalation_procedure: Emergency Change Board review if bypassing
business_impact: Final human check before impacting live customers.
